user.title: Add a wardrobe item
user.description: Register a piece of clothing. The NFC tag ID is optional — you can add it later via the item's settings.

error.tag_exists: Another wardrobe item already uses this NFC tag.

abort.already_configured: A wardrobe item with this name already exists.

init.title: Edit wardrobe item
init.description: Update the category, laundry type, wear threshold or NFC tag ID for this item.

error.tag_exists: Another wardrobe item already uses this NFC tag.

abort.no_options: The Wardrobe Summary device has no configurable options.

cycle_state.name: Cycle state
cycle_state.description: Advance a wardrobe item to the next state in the cycle (clean → worn → laundry → clean).

set_state.name: Set state
set_state.description: Set a wardrobe item to a specific state.

state.name: State
state.description: Target state for the wardrobe item.

bulk_set_state.name: Bulk set state
bulk_set_state.description: Set the state of every wardrobe item matching the given filters. Filters are combined with AND; omitted filters are ignored.

new_state.name: New state
new_state.description: Target state to apply to every matching item.

category.name: Category filter
category.description: Only affect items in this category.

laundry_type.name: Laundry-type filter
laundry_type.description: Only affect items of this laundry type.

current_state.name: Current-state filter
current_state.description: Only affect items currently in this state.
